'''Daryl F. Mallett''' (born [[May 3]], [[1960s#1969|1969]]{{fact}}) is the author of ''[[Tongue-tied: Bubo's Tale]]'', a short story appearing in [[1996]]'s ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]''. The story was less than six pages long and told the story of the [[Frog-dog/Legends|Frog-dog]], [[Buboicullaar/Legends|Buboicullaar]].

Mallett is also an actor, and has appeared as an extra in such [[Wikipedia:Star Trek|''Star Trek'']] projects as [[Wikipedia:Star Trek: The Next Generation|''The Next Generation'']], [[Wikipedia:Star Trek: Deep Space Nine|''Deep Space Nine'']], and [[Wikipedia:Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country|''The Undiscovered Country'']].
